content:
Sure, here is a JSON file that extracts the name, full address, and order of each location in the provided caption:
```json
{
    "locations": [
        {
            "name": "Assisi",
            "full_address": "Assisi, Province of Perugia, Umbria, Italy",
            "order": 0
        }
    ]
}
```

The order of the locations in the JSON file matches the order in which they appear in the caption. The full address of each location is also included, as well as the name of the location.

The caption mentions the location of Assisi, which is a city in the Italian region of Umbria. The full address of Assisi is as follows:

```
Assisi, Province of Perugia, Umbria, Italy
```

I hope this is helpful!
